notable_excerpts: The U.S. is going to be more expensive, right, compared to India. The flip side is there's no freight. But even then, if you look at total costs, the U.S. is expensive compared to India.
Even the running cost of power, et cetera, is pretty much similar because it's a not elevated power cost in the U.S.
Cipla continues to be a driving force in respiratory care, reaffirming our commitment to improving patient outcomes and making quality health care accessible across the nation.
Cipla welcomes the government's progressive GST reforms and a meaningful step towards making health care more affordable and accessible to all.
For over 90 years, Cipla has stood by its purpose of caring for life, and these reforms align closely with that commitment.
On the regulatory front, the U.S. FDA inspected our manufacturing facility located at Bommasandra, Bengaluru in quarter 1 FY '26. And during this quarter, the inspection was qualified as VAI.
Achin Gupta will take over as the designated CEO effective the 1st of January and assume full responsibilities from the 1st of April as the CEO and MD of the organization.
